journal_entry.description: Refinance bank loan — old note replaced by new note
journal_entry.rationale: The old loan liability is extinguished (debit to decrease liability) and a new loan liability is created (credit to increase liability). Both notes are for $100, so the transaction is a straight replacement with no net change in total liabilities.

output_debit_classifier.reason: Refinancing replaces one liability with another of equal amount. Old loan is paid off (liability decrease = debit), new loan is established (liability increase = credit). No cash changes hands between the business and external parties in a pure refinance, and no tax implications.
